M (i) "TK-d+41fl" ^ I I < H P H TT 3T^rf%fhT [W. *t. 09/2/2016-^TnTfT-^"] #^r f*rrc ^nt^, ^rjw ^rf^r fc* :— TJ^T f^TR" ^TKcT ^ <NH=I, a^TTSTR^T, WT II W^: 3, ^T-W1^ (i) if srf&^HI ^T.^T.f^. 198(3T) rTkfo 14 *TT#, 2014 g[RT ^TfN" 20 *TT# 2014 # ^ p r f ^ # *Tf sft gftr 3ff^R- ^ R WTT m.^T.R 872(3T), d l d ^ 8 R)dH<, 2016 5TCT ^ftSFT f^TT W «TT I 6615 GI/2017 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF COMMERCE AND INDUSTRY (Department of Commerce) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1375(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 48 of the Coffee Act, 1942 (VII of 1942), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Coffee Board (Cadre and Recruitment) Rules, 2014, in the Schedule, under the heading ‘(i) “Non-Technical” Administrative or Ministerial Posts’, serial number 2 relating to the post of Secretary and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted. [F. No. 09/2/2016-Plant-B] SANTOSH KUMAR SARANGI, Jt. Secy. Note:— The principal rules were published vide number G.S.R.198(E), dated the 14th March, 2014 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 20th March, 2014 and were last amended vide number G.S.R. 872(E), dated the 8th September, 2016.
